caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, focusing on Crypto-ML Ltd., a company that aims to capitalize on the cryptocurrency craze of 2017. The presenter, dressed in a suit and standing behind a podium, enthusiastically discusses the company's large-scale crypto-analysis platform. He explains how the platform utilizes heavy compute data analysis, transformation, and fetching processes, along with deep running predictions using Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks. The slide behind him highlights the company's ambitious goal to survive and thrive amidst the intense interest in cryptocurrencies during that period. The presenter appears confident and engaged, gesturing to emphasize key points as he shares insights into the technical and strategic aspects of their venture.
